trade.transit.success: Jump plotted and flown clean. The pilot's line held inside tolerance. I logged it that way.
trade.transit.fail: Jump plotted, flown rough. The pilot's line drifted outside tolerance. We arrived anyway, later than planned.
trade.arrival.1: Five tons of machine parts sold at Regina. The ledger shows the credit. Ask if you want the line item.
trade.arrival.2: Five tons of machine parts sold again. The price moved since last week. I priced it as of today, not last week.
trade.arrival.3: Machine parts sold a third time. Refined ore is still in the hold from this morning's buy.
trade.arrival.4: Final sale of the run is posted. Funds are current as of this line. I will keep counting after you close the screen.
